body_excerpt: In several functions of NotificationManagerService.java and related files, there is a possible way to record audio from the background without notification to the user due to a permission bypass. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with User execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
